data.name: SEXNATURAL: MILFs Must Be Filled 😈💦
data.detailed_description:
SEXNATURAL: MILFs Must Be Filled 😈💦

This adult-only visual novel combines intense investigation with elements of horror; your main weapons are your wits and… other assets.



Meet Gia and Aaron — fearless paranormal investigators who use both traditional and very unconventional methods to fight darkness. Their mission is to cleanse homes of evil spirits and… comfort the lonely hearts who dwell within.



The detective agency receives another call for help — a family reports a ghost infestation in their home. Time to get to work!

Key Features:

• Deep Investigative Immersion: Thoroughly search every location, interact with objects, find hidden clues, and delve into tragic stories to understand the nature of the entity you’re about to confront.
• Engaging Puzzles and Mini-games: Test your skills in varied challenges — from finding keys to critical areas to reconstructing clues from fragments. Piece the evidence together to draw the right conclusions and advance the case.
• Gritty ’80s Atmosphere: Explore unique, secret-filled locations where unimaginable events unfold. Every interior detail is steeped in the spirit of the era and hides its own story.
• Hypnosis as an Investigation Tool: Use Gia’s unique ability to enter characters’ subconscious minds. Peer into their past, uncover repressed trauma, and discover dark secrets that will aid your battle against supernatural forces.
• Passionate, Explicit Scenes: Interact with memorable characters — each with their own personality, history, and… hidden desires. Uncover their secrets to move the investigation forward.

data.short_description: Exorcism has never been this hot. Join Gia & Aaron in an 80s-inspired erotic horror where demons are banished with wild sex rituals, kinky hypnosis, and even one-hand-friendly boss battles. 💦
data.supported_languages:
英文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 or above
  • 處理器: Intel or AMD
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Direct X compatible
  • 儲存空間: 5 GB 可用空間
